empty.title: No listings yet
empty.description: Check back later or list an item yourself!
empty.filteredDescription: Try loosening your filters or a different search term.

saved.title: Saved searches
saved.emptyHint: Save your filters and return to them with one tap.

discovery.tip: Tip: use the Search tab for precise filters — Home feed is personalised.

immersive.budapestDistrictHint: Only items listed in the selected district are shown.

feed.default: Fresh listings from the community — browse, filter, save favorites.
feed.searchHint: Refine results with chips and the filter bar below.
feed.favoritesHint: You have {{count}} favorites — similar items may appear below.

product.noImagesHint: This listing cannot be displayed without images.
product.offerOwnProduct: You cannot make an offer on your own item.
product.messageModalHint: Ask the seller about this item.
product.messageSent: Message sent! Find it in Inbox.
product.bundleHint: Bundle from this seller: {{percent}}% off when buying {{items}}+ items.

closet.hint: Pick multiple items for one bundle checkout — discount on quantity.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Saved items
favorites.discoverHint: Not your saved favorites — browse new listings.
favorites.emptyHint: Tap the heart icon while browsing to save items here.

personalisation.title: Personalisation
personalisation.hint: Preferences tune your home feed ranking.
personalisation.brandsHint: e.g. Nike, Zara — add with Enter.

delivery.title: Push & email
delivery.hint: In-app notifications always work. Push (browser) and email depend on server env vars.
delivery.hintEnv: For production delivery, set VAPID keys and Resend/SMTP on Vercel (.env.example).
delivery.pushFailed: Could not enable push (permission or server keys).
delivery.pushUnsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: Your profile and listings follow marketplace rules. More controls coming soon.

trust.compactBody: Buyer protection, tracked shipping, dispute help — like major marketplaces.

protection.title: Buyer protection
protection.body: Fee covers dispute handling and secure checkout.

shipping.title: Tracked shipping
shipping.body: Foxpost, Packeta or home delivery — status in messages.

closet.title: More from this seller
closet.hint: Add to bundle — discount on multiple items when seller enabled it.

offer.title: Bundle offer
offer.messageIntro: Hi! I'm interested in this bundle:

bundle.checkoutNudge: {{count}} more items in your bundle — save up to {{savings}}.

sellerInsights.title: Seller insights
sellerInsights.subtitle: Revenue, sold count, top products — last 6 months.
sellerInsights.emptyHint: Once your first transaction is paid, you'll see metrics here.

sellerEngagement.title: Interest in your listings
sellerEngagement.subtitle: Favorites and quick replies — seller view.
sellerEngagement.empty: No favorites on your items yet.
sellerEngagement.emptyHint: When someone hearts an item, you can react here.

priceWatch.title: Price watch
priceWatch.hint: Watching {{count}} items — we highlight price drops.
priceWatch.noDrops: No fresh price drops among favorites.

messages.offerMinHint: At least {{min}} Ft (~60% of list price).
messages.offerMinDefault: Minimum follows the current list price.
messages.offerNoProduct: No product found for this conversation.
messages.offerBadIds: Invalid IDs — offer cannot be sent.
messages.offerDuplicate: You already have an active offer for this item.
messages.offerOwnProduct: You cannot make an offer on your own listing.
messages.offerProductUnavailable: This item is no longer available for offers.
messages.noProductContext: No product linked to this conversation.

offersList.emptyHint: When someone makes an offer, it will appear here.
offersList.counteredHint: The buyer must accept your counter-offer before payment.
offersList.acceptedHint: Buyer receives the payment link in chat
offersList.rejectConfirm: Decline this offer? The buyer will be notified in messages.
offersList.acceptedToast: Offer accepted — buyer sees it in messages.
offersList.rejectedToast: Offer declined — buyer has been notified.
offersList.acceptedWarn: Offer accepted, but chat notification failed: {{msg}}
offersList.rejectedWarn: Offer declined, but chat notification failed: {{msg}}
offersList.counterMin: Minimum counter-offer: {{min}} Ft (at least 60% of list price).
offersList.counterSent: Counter-offer sent — buyer sees it in messages.
offersList.counterWarn: Counter-offer saved, but chat notification failed: {{msg}}

chatTransaction.disputeOpen: Dispute open — our team is reviewing it.
chatTransaction.panelUnavailable: Order panel is not available yet.
chatTransaction.printPopupBlocked: Print popup blocked — allow pop-ups for this site.
chatTransaction.labelDownloaded: Foxpost label downloaded. You can now mark as shipped.
chatTransaction.shippedSuccess: Marked as shipped — carrier simulation started.
chatTransaction.stepHint: Step 1: download the Foxpost label. Then “Mark as shipped” unlocks.
chatTransaction.simulating: Carrier simulation in progress… Buyer is notified at each step.

auth.emailHint: Sign up and log in with email

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before logging in.
errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Try again later.

chatOffer.pendingHint: Waiting for the seller — expires within 24 hours.
chatOffer.sellerWaitingBody: The buyer can pay now. Once paid, you'll get a notification to pack and ship.
chatOffer.sellerAcceptedBody: You accepted the offer. The buyer receives the payment link.
chatOffer.buyerAcceptedBody: The seller accepted your offer. You can pay now.
chatOffer.sellerCounterSentBody: You sent a counter-offer — waiting for the buyer.
chatOffer.buyerCounterReceivedBody: The seller sent a counter-offer: {{price}} Ft — accept or decline below.
chatOffer.sellerCounterReceivedBody: The buyer sent a counter-offer: {{price}} Ft — accept or decline below.
chatOffer.buyerCounterSentBody: You sent a counter-offer — waiting for the seller.

saleMessage.sellerBody: The buyer paid. Print the Foxpost label and mark the parcel as shipped.
saleMessage.buyerBody: Payment succeeded. The seller will ship soon — track status here.
saleMessage.awaitingPaymentSync: Payment is still syncing — refresh if the button stays disabled.

block.confirm: Block this user? You won't be able to message each other.
block.cannotMessage: Can't send messages — a block is in place.

orderTimeline.title: Order progress
orderTimeline.buyerWaitingShip: The seller is packing / shipping. We'll notify you when it's on the way.

upload.title: List an item
upload.subtitle: Sell your pre-loved items to the community

ai.hint: Local llama3 — Hungarian title & description in marketplace tone.
ai.offline: Start Ollama (localhost:11434) and pull the llama3 model.

upload.name: Item name
upload.brandTypeaheadHint: Type to filter. If it's not in the list, press Enter or pick the highlighted custom row.
upload.brandCustomHint: Custom brand — press Enter to save
upload.imagesHintFirst: First photo becomes the cover (PNG, JPG, WEBP)
upload.remainingImages: Only {{count}} more photo(s) can be added.
upload.budapestDistrictHint: RobeoBP: buyers filter by this during browsing.

checkoutSuccess.title: Purchase successful!
checkoutSuccess.stepPaidHint: Funds are held securely until the item arrives.
checkoutSuccess.stepShipHint: The seller will ship your item soon.
checkoutSuccess.stepDeliveryHint: Your item is on its way.
checkoutSuccess.toastSuccess: Purchase successful! Your order is recorded.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.buyerProtectionHint: If the item does not arrive or does not match the description, you get a full refund.
checkout.protectionFeeTooltip: 5% of item price, min 200 Ft, max 5000 Ft — funds are held in escrow until you receive the parcel.
checkout.selectShipping: Choose a delivery method to pay
checkout.selectFoxpost: Pick a Foxpost locker on the map

bundle.title: Bundle checkout
bundle.hint: One shipment, one payment — same seller.
bundle.needTwoItems: At least 2 items required for bundle checkout.

checkout.termsHint: By paying you accept the purchase terms.

terms.required: Accept the terms to continue to payment.

packeta.title: Packeta pickup point
packeta.listHint: Without a Packeta widget key we use the built-in demo point list.
packeta.noResults: No results — try a different search.

localPickup.title: Local pickup — cash / direct P2P
localPickup.body: RobeoBP beta: free local pickup in Budapest. After booking, coordinate the meet-up, location and payment in chat. No Stripe, no courier, no fee.
localPickup.disclaimerBody: RobeoBP is a free community test app. We don't handle payments and accept no liability for in-person meetings or items. Always arrange meetups in safe, public places.

errors.offerNotFound: Offer not found or no longer available.
errors.offerNotAccepted: Only accepted offers can be paid.
errors.productMissing: Product for this offer is missing.
errors.ownProduct: You cannot buy your own item.
errors.foxpostRequired: Foxpost delivery requires selecting a locker.
errors.packetaRequired: Packeta delivery requires selecting a pickup point.
errors.stripeMissing: Stripe is not configured. Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_… to .env.local and restart the dev server.
errors.invalidRedirectUrl: App URL is missing. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 to .env.local and restart the dev server.

uploadWizard.title: List an item
uploadWizard.subtitle: Step by step — your draft is saved automatically
uploadWizard.photosHint: The first photo is the cover. Up to 6 photos.

ordersHub.purchasesHint: Track your purchases — payment, shipping, pickup confirmation.
ordersHub.salesHint: Manage your sales — print labels, mark shipped, track pickup.

orders.title: Order history
orders.subtitle: Your purchases and sales
orders.salesHint: After payment, mark the parcel as shipped in messages or here.
orders.confirmHint: Some orders await pickup confirmation — confirm in messages when received.

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Quick answers and support
help.quickSubtitle: Safe buying, shipping, and contacting sellers.

sections.protectionBody: Funds are held in escrow until you receive the item. Report issues in messages.
sections.shippingBody: Foxpost, Packeta, or home delivery at checkout. Track status in messages and order history.

contactSeller.title: Contact seller
contactSeller.desc: Send a message from the product page, then continue in Messages.

buyerProtection.title: Buyer protection
buyerProtection.desc: 5% fee, min 200 Ft — details at checkout.

shipping.title: Delivery options
shipping.desc: Locker, pickup point, or home — chosen at checkout.

orders.title: Order history
orders.desc: Purchases and sales with status, date, and amount.

q1.a: Checkout uses Stripe with buyer protection.

q3.a: Profile → About, or the Order history page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or was removed.

offerModal.messagePlaceholder: e.g. happy to pick up in person…
